scripts.deploy: npm run build && sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/server-dash/build && sudo cp -r .next/standalone/. /var/lib/server-dash/build/ && sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/server-dash/build/.next && sudo cp -r .next/static /var/lib/server-dash/build/.next/static && sudo cp -r public /var/lib/server-dash/build/public && sudo chown -R server-dash:server-dash /var/lib/server-dash/build && sudo systemctl restart server-dash
